chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-2157 of 2025. Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) HEARING. 1. For orders on Office Objection Nos.1 to 3. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.08.2025. Mr. Mallag Dashti, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Ali Hyder Saleem, Addl. P.G. ************* Through this Petition, the Petitioner seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.60/2025 under Section 6/9(a) Sindh CNSA, 2024, registered at P.S SIU. Now the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and it is only pending required assent of the Governor, therefore, the Petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the learned trial Court/Special Tribunal/or competent Court as the case may be under the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025 for his appropriate relief. Under such circumstances, the instant Petition is disposed of; however, the Petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial Court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
